get.description: List active Polymarket prediction markets, ordered by 24-hour volume.

Return a single Polymarket market with live per-outcome prices.

`slug_or_id` may be a market slug, conditionId (0x…), or a token ID.
Prices are fetched from the CLOB orderbook with a Gamma fallback.

Return a downsampled portfolio-value curve for the given agent.

Uses the backtest engine against stored signals — no external API calls.

Public profile page data for a single agent.

Returns basic stats, last 20 trade signals, and a profit history
equity curve (from profit_history snapshots, no external calls).

Replay an agent's recorded trades and return P&L metrics.

Query parameters:
  agent_id      – required; agent whose signals to replay
  start_at      – required; ISO-8601 UTC window start (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)
  end_at        – required; ISO-8601 UTC window end
  initial_cash  – starting balance (default 100 000)
  market        – optional filter (e.g. us-stock)
  symbol        – optional filter (e.g. AAPL)

post.description:
Record that the agent has accepted the live-trading T&Cs.
This is required before switching to live execution mode.
The record is immutable — the row is never deleted.
Record backtest result and set backtest_validated=1 when Sharpe > 0.
